_comment: PUBLIC ADDRESSES ONLY. Copy to public-registry.json (gitignored). Never put keypairs, seeds, or mnemonics here.

securityTiers.T0_cold: Master backup — offline only. Never funded for ops. Never in repo, chat, or Vercel.
securityTiers.T1_treasury: Jackpot + tax — high value. Sign payouts only. Minimal device exposure.
securityTiers.T2_admin: Snapshot / settlement — separate from T1 if possible.
securityTiers.T3_consolidation: Receives fee sweeps from T4 before forwarding to T1.
securityTiers.T4_hot_ops: Floor buys, LP setup, launch snipes — minimal SOL, burnable if compromised.

cold_master.purpose: Encrypted offline backup of T1/T2 recovery — NEVER used for daily txs.

deployer.purpose: Anchor deploy + one-time program init. Drain remaining SOL after deploy.

jackpot_tax.purpose: Receives token tax SOL; pays winners. Maps to VITE_TAX_RECIPIENT.

admin.purpose: Snapshot, set winners, settlement. Maps to ADMIN_ADDRESS in constants.

fee_consolidation.purpose: Manual harvest destination — sweep LP/trading fees from all launch coins here, then forward to jackpot_tax.

floor_buy_ops.purpose: Manual floor buys on launch coins (buy the bottom). Keep low SOL balance.
floor_buy_ops.keypairLocation: OUTSIDE REPO — hot Phantom or burner

lp_ops.purpose: Manual LP add/remove on Raydium/Orca/etc. for launch coins.

trix_launch_yang.purpose: TRiX triple launch — Coin 1 (Yang): attention / shell / fair-launch hype.

trix_launch_yin.purpose: TRiX triple launch — Coin 2 (Yin): 1B core PEPEBALL — lottery-eligible token candidate.
envVars: VITE_PEPEBALL_MINT when this becomes active lottery mint

trix_launch_bridge.purpose: TRiX triple launch — Coin 3: 1:1 bridge / discovery mechanic (players figure out the game).

legacyDoNotFund._comment: Old repo addresses — NEVER fund unless YOU verified keypair on disk.
legacyDoNotFund.FjbPunNH9dveGmNZMPaAwCpZWRYQKP1hqJH8Ua3y: legacy jackpot — replace on game day
legacyDoNotFund.2QAQ367aBeHgCoHQwHo8x7ga34dANguG5Nu82Rs4: legacy admin — replace on game day

preflightBeforeFunding: ALL wallets are NEW — no reuse of legacy addresses
YOU backed up every T0–T2 keypair outside repo
Vercel env updated with PUBLIC addresses only
T4 hot wallets funded with MINIMAL SOL only
T1 jackpot funded only after verify + cold backup confirmed
